caption: A man wearing a blue long-sleeved shirt sits behind a keyboard in a room with dark curtains for a background. He is positioned in front of a microphone on a stand, and nearby are a guitar, a trumpet, and studio monitors. Small plush toys are perched on various surfaces behind him. Throughout the sequence, the man gestures with his hands while speaking. He starts by moving both hands in front of his chest, then rests them on the keyboard, before bringing his hands together and finally gesturing again with his right hand. In the final sequence of images, a YouTube subscription button appears on the left side of the screen with the text "SUBSCRIBED" and a notification bell icon. The lighting remains consistent, and the man stays centered in the frame as he communicates.
